title: Episode 1
overview: After an attack on his home village of Toltus, Cress Albane is captured by the villain Mars and has his father's pendant stolen from him.

title: Episode 2
overview: After the destruction caused by the Magitek weapon, Cress and his companions journey on a mission to restore enough Mana in order to travel back to the "present".

title: Episode 3
overview: Cress finally gets his chance to confront Dhaos, but as he and his newfound companions battle him, Dhaos manages to slip through time into the future.

title: Episode 4
overview: As Dhaos' rampage threatens the very existence of the world, Origin reveals to the party the true nature of the Eternal Sword.
